The plant's extracts have been reported to have potential health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in protecting against oxidative stress, inflammation, and infections. The bioactive constituents of Pulassarium podocarpum include terpenoids, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
